content: Robin Singh Rawat is an AI Generalist and Full Stack Engineer based in Sonipat, Haryana, India. He specializes in building AI-powered web applications and interfaces that make Large Language Models usable for real people. With 5 years of professional experience, he bridges the gap between modern full-stack engineering (React, Next.js, Angular) and applied AI (RAG systems, LLM orchestration, prompt engineering). He is open to remote opportunities worldwide.

Robin positions himself at the intersection of full-stack engineering and AI integration. He is not a pure ML researcher — he is a builder who takes AI capabilities (LLMs, RAG, automation) and ships them as real, usable products. His unique angle: 5 years of production full-stack experience + hands-on AI specialization, meaning he can build the AI logic AND the interface users interact with.

Robin started as a full-stack developer, spent 4+ years at Builder.AI as a Software Engineer building enterprise-scale web applications, then moved to Arth Impact for fintech work. He transitioned from Senior Full Stack Engineer into AI specialization, combining his deep full-stack skills with applied AI to build LLM-powered products. He is currently completing the Outskill AI Accelerator program (2026) covering RAG systems, prompt engineering, and LLM orchestration.

tags: how did robin get into ai

content: Builder.AI — Software Engineer (January 2021 – April 2025). Robin spent over 4 years here building enterprise web apps and scalable full-stack architecture. Key results: delivered 10+ responsive web apps using Angular 14+, React, Next.js, Tailwind, and TypeScript. Improved average page load speed by ~30%. Reduced bundle size by 20% using lazy loading and RxJS optimization. Helped convert a monolithic app into microfrontend modules. Integrated RESTful APIs with Redux state management, improving API reliability by 40%. Built reusable component libraries that cut dev time by 25%. Maintained 85%+ Jest test coverage. Supported vulnerability scans for SLA compliance.

Arth Impact — Software Engineer (September 2025 – January 2026). Domain: fintech. Robin built responsive fintech dashboards and loan management modules using React, Next.js, and Angular. Created dynamic forms and reusable UI logic via custom hooks. Integrated loan, customer, and payment APIs. Improved UI consistency with Material UI and Angular Material. Enhanced React Native Android UI components and API-driven workflows.

Full-stack & core technical skills: Angular (14+), React, Next.js, React Native, TypeScript, JavaScript, Redux, Zustand, TanStack Query, RxJS, Tailwind CSS, Material UI, Angular Material, HTML, CSS, WebSockets, RESTful APIs, Jest, Unit Testing, Git, GitHub, GitLab.

AI & LLM skills: OpenAI API, Claude API (Anthropic), LangChain, Prompt Engineering, AI Automation, n8n (workflow automation), RAG Systems (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), Hugging Face. Robin can build custom chatbots, voice assistants, RAG pipelines, and AI-powered automation workflows.

Tools & platforms Robin uses: Postman, ClickUp, Jira, Figma, Android Studio, VS Code, Chrome DevTools, Sentry (error tracking), Vercel, Netlify, AWS, Lighthouse (performance auditing), Mend (security scanning).

Project: Builder Studio — a no-code/low-code drag-and-drop app development platform (January 2021 – April 2025). Robin contributed to building dynamic component-based UIs with Angular and TypeScript. He delivered modules including form builders, logic flow engines, and pricing configuration tools. Integrated REST APIs for automation, cost estimation, and live previews. Ensured responsive, cross-browser design throughout.

Project: Builder Tracker — a real-time project tracking dashboard (January 2021 – April 2025). Robin engineered dashboards using Angular and RxJS with live sync via WebSocket integration. Built interactive timelines, summary cards, and real-time status views. Implemented motion effects and responsive UI based on Figma prototypes.

Project: Builder Home — a user onboarding and account management portal (January 2021 – April 2025). Built with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind. Features include secure authentication, role-based access control, onboarding flows, project/team/subscription management. Robin built reusable components, used lazy loading for performance, and maintained 85%+ Jest unit test coverage.

Robin offers the following services: 1) Starter Website — clean, fast websites and landing pages for individuals and small businesses. 2) Enterprise Web Application — scalable, full-stack web apps for complex business needs. 3) AI Workflow Automation — end-to-end automation pipelines that eliminate manual, repetitive work. 4) Custom Chatbot — intelligent chatbots for websites, WhatsApp, and customer support. 5) Custom Voice Assistant — AI-powered voice agents for sales, support, and operations. 6) RAG System / Knowledge Base AI — smart document Q&A and internal knowledge search systems. Coming soon: AI Content Pipeline (automated content generation for video, copy, and social).

Robin's project budget ranges: Less than $500, $500–$2,000, $2,000–$5,000, $5,000+, or 'Not sure yet'. To start a project, fill out the contact form with your name, email, phone, selected services, budget range, and an optional message describing your needs.
Education: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) from Hindu Institute of Management, August 2016 – May 2019.

Certifications: 1) AI Accelerator Program (Outskill, 2026) — specialization in AI integration, LLM orchestration, RAG architectures, and building production-ready AI applications. 2) Advance Program in Full Stack Software Engineering (NIIT, July 2020, 216 hours) — covering full-stack frameworks, backend architecture, and database management.

Robin's contact details: Email — robinrawat37@gmail.com. WhatsApp/Phone — +91-9416149624. He's based in Sonipat, Haryana, India and is open to remote work worldwide. Social links: LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/robinrawat1), GitHub (github.com/robinrawat007), X/Twitter (twitter.com/robinrawat37), Instagram (instagram.com/robinrawat01). Newsletter: thestackshift.beehiiv.com.

Q: Who is Robin? A: Robin Singh Rawat is an AI Generalist and Full Stack Engineer with 5 years of experience. He builds AI-powered web apps using React, Next.js, Angular, and integrates LLMs, RAG systems, and automation into real products. He's based in India and open to remote work.

Q: What does Robin do? A: Robin builds AI-powered web applications and interfaces. He combines full-stack engineering (React, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript) with AI integration (LLM APIs, RAG systems, chatbots, voice assistants, workflow automation) to ship products that make AI accessible to real users.

Q: What technologies does Robin use? A: Full Stack — React, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript, Tailwind, Material UI, Redux, RxJS. AI — OpenAI API, Claude API, LangChain, RAG systems, n8n automation, Hugging Face. Tools — Git, Figma, Jira, AWS, Vercel, Sentry, Jest.

Q: How can I hire Robin or start a project? A: The easiest way is to email robinrawat37@gmail.com or message on WhatsApp at +91-9416149624. Just share what you're building, which services you need, and a rough budget range — Robin typically responds quickly and can discuss scope and timelines from there.

Q: How many years of experience does Robin have? A: Robin has 5 years of professional software engineering experience, with 10+ projects completed and 10+ satisfied clients. He spent 4+ years at Builder.AI and also worked at Arth Impact in fintech.

Q: What services does Robin offer? A: Robin offers six services — Starter Websites, Enterprise Web Applications, AI Workflow Automation, Custom Chatbots, Custom Voice Assistants, and RAG System / Knowledge Base AI. An AI Content Pipeline service is coming soon.
Q: Where is Robin located? A: Robin is based in Sonipat, Haryana, India. He works remotely and is open to remote opportunities and clients worldwide.

Q: Does Robin have real AI experience? A: Yes. Robin is completing the Outskill AI Accelerator (2026) covering RAG, prompt engineering, and LLM orchestration. He works with OpenAI API, Claude API, LangChain, n8n, and Hugging Face. He offers production AI services including chatbots, voice assistants, RAG systems, and workflow automation.

Q: Can I see Robin's resume? A: Robin's portfolio website covers his full background. For a quick summary — 5 years experience, BCA degree, NIIT full-stack certification, Outskill AI Accelerator, 4+ years at Builder.AI, fintech work at Arth Impact, and expertise across React/Next.js/Angular + AI/LLM integration. Contact him at robinrawat37@gmail.com for a formal resume.

Q: How much does a chatbot or project cost? A: Robin works across budget ranges — under $500, $500–$2,000, $2,000–$5,000, and $5,000+. If you're not sure, that's fine too. Reach out with your requirements and Robin will give you a tailored estimate.
Q: Does Robin have a newsletter or blog? A: Yes — Robin runs The Stack Shift newsletter at thestackshift.beehiiv.com covering AI, full-stack engineering, and building with LLMs.

Q: [anything not covered] A: I don't have specific info on that yet. Your best bet is to reach Robin directly — email robinrawat37@gmail.com or WhatsApp +91-9416149624. He responds quickly and would be happy to help.
